title: SENIOR ACCOUNTANT
description: Senior accountant who completes accounting activities with accuracy and speed with extensive experience in full life cycle of general ledger accounting
experience: Senior Accountant: Reconciled various balance sheet accounts, performed primary liaison for interim and annual Deloitte audits, reviewed and analyzed journal entries, managed international payrolls and VAT, resolved currency fluctuation issues, analyzed expatriate expenditures, prepared K-1 schedules and month-end accrual journal entries. Prepared and analyzed expense allocations and inter-company transactions, and monthly financial statements. Accomplishments include identifying material misstatement in prepaid property insurance and clarifying Japanese payroll systems. Accountant: Maintained financial records in accordance with GAAP, analyzed and reconciled G/L accounts, prepared semi-annual and end-year financial statements. Coordinated with warehouse manager, communicated with external CPAs, established payroll records, computed hours and deductions, and assisted in training AP/AR. Performed semi-annual inventory valuation. Financial Analyst: Managed and forecasted funds for 350 ATM terminals, reconciled and settled for an affiliate, prepared monthly Profit and Loss reports. Analyzed expenses during M&A due diligence, processing costs, and network fees. Prepared audit work papers, performed G/L analysis, assisted in financial statement preparation, and reviewed daily procedures. Translated documents and consulted private investors.
